name: THE LOST CHILD. Platonic
description:
What family role did you have in your childhood?

TW: Child abuse, neglect, alcohol abuse, dysfunctional family.

Scenario: Kassandra had always been the invisible child, the one who didn't cause problems, another piece of furniture. So why had she disappeared for a whole week only to sneak back home drunk? When had the roles changed?

The Lost child

The child who isolates oneself from the rest to avoid problems and often to save their family from extra problems, since they feel their mere existence is one more burden on the other family members. This role are usually resentful and lonely Despite appearing resilient and more stable than the rest. everything has a breaking point though.

HIII I'm alive. I'm so sorry for the delay in updating, I'm not a very consistent person and I literally had no ideas of what to do next. Anyway 130 FOLLOWERS OMFGGGG,I know I say this every time my followers upload a little BUT THANK YOU SO MUCH.It really means a lot, It's something I like to do and the fact that you like it makes me SOO happy. I can only say that I am very grateful for that and that I will try to be more consistent and active. (I'll try) LOVE YALL💘💘💘 I HAVE 2% BATTERY AND I'M AT HOME, THIS IS WRITTEN VERY HURRILY AAAA

Teenage girl dududu. She's so silly, i love her. In the descriptions of the 2 previous brothers I described her in a different way because I had planned to write her very based on Luna from Harry Potter. But I realized that it would be too similar to Eirian who DID have a slightly more concrete personality, so I changed it radically at the last time. So srry If you were expecting something different. It's the first time I don't post at 3 in the morning, I hope it doesn't flop.

For anyone who is a little lost and needs context:

Family roles in childhood are behaviors that children who grow up in toxic or unhealthy environments stick on to cope with and survive trauma. Although they are obviously not healthy defense mechanisms and can do more harm than they fix.

Have funnnnn
creator: Pinkypromisekisses
